President Donald Trump's attorney general nominee, William Barr, has said he will allow Special Counsel Robert Mueller to finish the investigation into Russia's role in the 2016 presidential election, Republican Senator Lindsey Graham said on Wednesday.
Graham told reporters Barr assured him the investigation would continue. "I can assure you he has a very high opinion of Mr Mueller and he is committed to letting Mr Mueller finish his job," Graham said.
'I can assure you he has a very high opinion of Mr. Mueller and he is committed to letting Mr. Mueller finish his job,' Senator Lindsey Graham told reporters.

Did you know that even if you have a home warranty program you are still required to properly maintain your appliances in order for your warranty program to be in good standing?
The majority of appliance failures, (primarily with our refrigerators, dryers and whole house cooling system), are caused by poorly maintained appliances. These systems build heat or are designed to dissipate heat. So if the coils are clogged with lint or debris and cannot properly do their job they are considered to be poorly maintained. Poor maintained appliances use more electricity to do the job they are designed to do and you stand a good chance of being turned down for warranty reimbursement for failure to maintain your appliance.
Clean the interior cabinet and internal ducts of your dryer and inspect exhaust pipe from dryer to wall. If we see that there may be some blockage of this pipe in the wall we will recommend a company and inform you of the need to clean this piping as well.
Clean the refrigerator coils, remove condenser cavity covers inspect and clean condenser fan motor.
Note that Large built in such as Viking, Sub Zero that have to be removed for service we do not do. You will have to call your local dealer for this service.
Check Condenser Compressor and Fan Motor Capacitor.
Check Furnace Fan Motor and Capacitor.
Check and clean A-Coils drain line if accessible.
Clean the interior cabinet and ducts of your dryer and inspect exhaust pipe from dryer to wall. If we see that there may be some blockage of this pipe in the wall we will recommend a company and inform you of the need to clean this piping as well.
Inspect Washer and clean any filters if present.
Inspect Washer Water supply lines.

Verb: When a rapper pronounces a word differently then it is traditionally pronounced as to make said word rhyme with a word it conventionally does not rhyme with.
Eminem is rhyme pinching when he mispronounces the word "by" to make it sound like it rhymes with the word "god" , even though these words do not congrue with a traditional rhyme.

Alex Sanchez has written eight novels for young people, including the groundbreaking American Library Association Best Book for Young Adults Rainbow Boys and Lambda Award-winning So Hard to Say.
Alex Sanchez has written eight novels for young people, including the groundbreaking American Library Association Best Book for Young Adults Rainbow Boys and Lambda Award-winning So Hard to Say. His novel Bait won the 2009 Florida Book Award Gold Medal for Young Adult fiction. Alex received his master's in guidance and counseling from Old Dominion University and worked for many years as a youth and family counselor. Born in Mexico to parents of German and Cuban heritage, he now resides in Florida and on the web at .

Cenedella gave up painting for most of the years in between 1966 to 1975, producing only one painting, "George Grosz in America" (1973). However, during this time, he produced over two hundred Black & White, Ink & Brush drawings, done at night after his 9 to 5 jobs. Most of these drawings have not been exhibited in their original form till this day.

Desertification, the degradation of land in arid areas, is a growing problem due to deforestation, fires, and climate change. Magnus Larsson, a student at London's Architectural Association has a drastic solution–a 6,000 km long wall of artificially solidified sandstone spanning the Sahara Desert from east to west. Dunes along Larsson's sandstone wall will act as a combination of refugee housing and a block against the desert.
It's a big departure from current anti-desertification methods, including water conservation, soil management, forestry, sustainable energy, improved land use, wildlife protection, poverty alleviation. Larsson believes that the interior of the dunes along his sandstone wall could be used to achieve multiple goals at once–helping soil remain fertile, providing water and shade, and taking care of plants and animals.
If it is ever constructed, Larsson's sandstone wall could support the Green Wall Sahara initiative, which aims to plant a shelterbelt of trees across the African continent.
i wish to learn this technology but how?

What a great idea! Creating sandstone, which is 10-20% CO2 by weight, would help make up for all that cement we use (3rd largest source of CO2 emissions).  Sequestering CO2 (10-20% by weight in sandstone) would be another great side benefit!
reminds me of this movement:  most especially roger & martyn dean's housing designs.

Comic-con was a great weekend away. Good times were had by the whole society. Best parts included meeting David Lloyd, who is a very funny and friendly man, getting a hug from Paul McGann, getting freaking adorable manga portraits drawn by Yishan Li and an improptu rugby game with a plushie at the train station ("Highlanders versus the Foreign Fucks"). Also, swords. Like all of us bought swords. It was awesome.

D.C. Law Library - D.C. Law 5-102. District of Columbia Unemployment Compensation Act Amendments Act of 1984.
D.C. Law 5-102. District of Columbia Unemployment Compensation Act Amendments Act of 1984.
↪ D.C. Law 5-102. District of Columbia Unemployment Compensation Act Amendments Act of 1984.
Law 5-102, the "District of Columbia Unemployment Compensation Act Amendments Act of 1984," was introduced in Council and assigned Bill No. 5-377, which was retained by Council. The Bill was adopted on first and second readings on April 30, 1984 and May 15, 1984, respectively. Signed by the Mayor on June 6, 1984, it was assigned Act No. 5-143 and transmitted to both Houses of Congress for its review.

If you're looking for a tuxedo in Buellton, California, you have plenty of options. Rent a tuxedo or buy one but just make sure the colors match the occasion. For example, if you want to purchase a tuxedo for your wedding, coordinate accents with the bridal party. A vest, cummerbund, and tie are the items that you can coordinate with the bridesmaid dresses. Not going with a tux? Every man can use...Read moreIf you're looking for a tuxedo in Buellton, California, you have plenty of options. Rent a tuxedo or buy one but just make sure the colors match the occasion. For example, if you want to purchase a tuxedo for your wedding, coordinate accents with the bridal party. A vest, cummerbund, and tie are the items that you can coordinate with the bridesmaid dresses. Not going with a tux? Every man can use a nice suit. Menswear stores can get you fitted in a formal suit or dinner jacket in no time.
Shopping for your wedding gown? Check Buellton bridal boutiques to find the wedding dress of your dreams. Bring the girls and try on strapless dresses, designer gowns and a few other styles to find the right fit for your body. Most of the bridal shops also carry jewelry, veils, and shoes. While you're there, check out bridesmaids dresses.
You can also browse department stores to find tuxedos, suits and formal wear in Buellton. Department stores as well as some specialty shops let you shop for both menswear and dresses. This way you can outfit your whole party at one place! Once you arrive at the store, the sales clerks can take measurements for the tuxedo or gown.

Fashioned from North American Walnut, the Valencia interior door adds a natural, modern style to any room. With its V-groove 5-panel effect, and aluminium inserts, its clean, bold lines give this pre-finished flush door an unmistakable style that will transform the look of any contemporary styled home.
Deanta offers the thickest lippings available in the UK internal door market. All Deanta Doors are solid core, and have 18mm solid walnut lippings around the entire door meaning that a total of 32mm can be taken off the height and width of these Deanta Valencia Doors, with solid Walnut and aluminium infills, ensuring that they will fit into almost any size of door opening.
Deanta Valencia Walnut Doors are manufactured from engineered door components which can include MDF, particle-board and laminated timber.
Valencia Doors have a V-groove with real Walnut inserts to give the appearance of a solid Walnut door face, with solid 18mm Walnut door lippings.
Fashioned from North American Walnut, the Valencia interior door adds a natural, modern style to any room. With its V-grooved 5-panel effect, and aluminium inserts, its clean, bold lines give this pre-finished flush door an unmistakable style that will transform the look of any contemporary styled home.
Deanta Walnut Valencia Pre-finished Doors have a clear lacquer finish; If the door needs alteration, cutting or planing for fitting, then it must be re-varnished immediately to prevent moisture absorption, which may lead to warping or splitting.
- We cannot exchange Walnut Valencia Doors after order - Deanta Valencia Walnut Doors are supplied as a Special Order.

thorntonensis: "The name thorntonensis derives from Thornton Peak, the type and, as yet, only known locality for the species."1 - Greer, A.E. (1983). The Australian scincid lizard genus Calyptotis De Vis: resurrection of the name, description of four new species, and discussion of relationships. Records of the Australian Museum, 35(1):29-59. Note: since its original description, the species has been found elsewhere in the Thornton Uplands.
"External ear indicated by a depression that is completely scaled; Head and body depressed; ear a scaly, superficial disc (tympanum); postorbital bone absent."1 - Greer, A.E. (1983). The Australian scincid lizard genus Calyptotis De Vis: resurrection of the name, description of four new species, and discussion of relationships. Records of the Australian Museum, 35(1):29-59.
Cone-eared calyptotis (Calyptotis lepidorostrum) - Yellowish belly, pinkish underneath tail. Found south of Mackay.
Red-tailed calyptotis (Calyptotis ruficauda) - Has ear openings. Found south of Mackay.
Scute-snouted calyptotis (Calyptotis scutirostrum) - lacks prefrontal scales. Found south of Mackay.
Broad-templed calyptotis (Calyptotis temporalis) - lacks prefrontal scales. Has ear openings. Found south of Airlie.
This species was described by Greer in 1983.1 - Greer, A.E. (1983). The Australian scincid lizard genus Calyptotis De Vis: resurrection of the name, description of four new species, and discussion of relationships. Records of the Australian Museum, 35(1):29-59.
Thornton Uplands, in Far North Queensland.
Greer, A.E. (1983). The Australian scincid lizard genus Calyptotis De Vis: resurrection of the name, description of four new species, and discussion of relationships. Records of the Australian Museum, 35(1):29-59.
Calyptotis thorntonensis at the Australian Reptile Online Database. Last updated 2017-06-15 09:11:41.

Announcement Welcome! The custom hammocks are currently unavailable as I am back in school full time. However, the crochet pattern will always be available! I've been told it's an easy enough pattern to be someone's first project!
Welcome! The custom hammocks are currently unavailable as I am back in school full time. However, the crochet pattern will always be available! I've been told it's an easy enough pattern to be someone's first project!
This animal hammock completes my toddler's toy corner perfectly! I love it!
This totally makes the room! Super easy to hang and surprisingly roomy. We've got tons of space for new additions.
I added som leaf ribbons from Michaels to go with our safari nursery theme.
ALL hammock orders are non-refundable. If a mistake was made by me, please contact me via Etsy Conversation and I'll be happy to negotiate a plan.
Unfortunately, if the package gets lost in the mail after the tracking number has been sent, I cannot offer a full refund. Once the post office takes the package, it's no longer in my control. I understand the disappointment of having lost money in the situation so I am willing to refund half of the purchase price or half off another order! Hopefully that is better than a total loss.
Crochet pattern orders are non-refundable if the pattern file was opened. If the file was sent, but not opened (I can see if it was opened or not) a refund will be issued.
Payments can be made via Paypal or direct checkout.
Custom hammocks will not be made until payment has been received.
Orders are shipped via USPS First Class shipping unless the Priority Shipping Upgrade was purchased.
First Class shipping comes within 7-10 days of being shipped.
Priority Shipping is available for US orders only, and packages come within 1-3 days of being shipped.

A 29-year-old property developer has bought Delph House and Leylands House and plans to start the conversion scheme next month. He says the initiative will help the area "turn a corner" and provide a positive future for the community and local economy. "This will breathe new life into Keighley," said Nottingham-based Arran Bailey, owner of ALB Investments. "The apartments have such amazing views of beautiful countryside and it only seemed right to regenerate the blocks to match the surrounding landscape." He plans to turn the 53-year-old high-rise buildings, at Parkwood Rise, into 190 one and two-bed apartments. Work is expected to take 18 months to complete.
The sale of the tower blocks to ALB was handled by Eddisons, who said: "We had a significant amount of interest in both blocks – receiving in excess of ten bids – and are delighted to have secured a great result on behalf of our valued client. It's been fantastic to see a developer with such ambition."
We had a significant amount of interest in both blocks – receiving in excess of ten bids – and are delighted to have secured a great result on behalf of our valued client. It's been fantastic to see a developer with such ambition.

The elements of good teaching will be discussed and demonstrated through lectures, practice teaching sessions, and discussions of problems encountered in the actual teaching environment. The staff consists of faculty and experienced graduate students. An integral part of the course is a required one-day workshop BEFORE the first day of formal classes.
Training in pedagogy in the first semester of attendance is required for all incoming Wesleyan MA and PhD students who have not already fulfilled this requirement at Wesleyan. BA/MA students are not required to get training in pedagogy but may choose to do so.
Evaluation will be based on the level of active contribution to the course.
This section is required for incoming Music MA and Ph. D. students who have not taken graduate pedagogy at Wesleyan before.
First meeting will be held on 8/30/17 from 9:00-Noon in Woodhead, ESC 184. Subsequent meetings TBA by the Teaching Assistants.
This section is required for incoming Mathematics, Computer Science, and Physics MA and Ph. D. students who have not taken graduate pedagogy before. Incoming Astronomy and Earth and Environmental Sciences MA students should enroll in ASTR 430 to complete their pedagogy requirement. This section is optional for BA/MA students if you are not working as a TA this year. It is required for BA/MA students who will be Teaching Assistants during this academic year.
This section is required for incoming Biology, Chemistry, and Molecular Biology and Biochemistry MA and Ph. D. students who have not taken graduate pedagogy before. Incoming Astronomy and Earth and Environmental Sciences MA students should enroll in ASTR 430 to complete their pedagogy requirement. This section is optional for BA/MA students if you are not working as a TA this year. It is required for BA/MA students who will be Teaching Assistants during this academic year.
